verses.1: I will sing of Your loving devotion and justice; to You, O LORD, I will sing praises.
verses.2: I will ponder the way that is blameless—when will You come to me? I will walk in my house with integrity of heart.
verses.3: I will set no worthless thing before my eyes. I hate the work of those who fall away; it shall not cling to me.
verses.4: A perverse heart shall depart from me; I will know nothing of evil.
verses.5: Whoever slanders his neighbor in secret, I will put to silence; the one with haughty eyes and a proud heart, I will not endure.
verses.6: My eyes favor the faithful of the land, that they may dwell with me; he who walks in the way of integrity shall minister to me.
verses.7: No one who practices deceit shall dwell in my house; no one who tells lies shall stand in my presence.
verses.8: Every morning I will remove all the wicked of the land, that I may cut off every evildoer from the city of the LORD.

metadata.source: Derived from the Berean Standard Bible (BSB). Missing verses restored from the Textus Receptus tradition for completeness.
